headline: Bank Groups Say Senate Stablecoin Rewards Proposal ‘Falls Short’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Bank groups pushed back Monday on a crypto market structure proposal, escalating pressure on US lawmakers to continue negotiations over a key stablecoin rewards provision.
